subject: .tiff extention and/or symbolic link in Windows
body:
Hi Dimitry,

We use JADAS for automatic data collection. This program produces movie 
stacks with the *.tiff extension. Warp cannot treat this, and we rename it 
to *.tif, but like to use *.tiff files directly. We'd appreciate it if you 
could consider this option in the next release. Or I wonder if there is a 
way to create symbolic links in Windows 10?

Thank you in advance.
Best regards,

Koji
